spec_match.rationale: Correctly maps CSS definitions, mapping auto, contain, and chain scroll absorption behaviors accurately.

interactive.rationale: Features a highly immersive simulated phone frame drawer scroller, mode toggling switches, and a scroll reset helper.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent description of a maps-style bottom sheet demo.

edge_cases.rationale: Resets scrolling offsets (scrollTop = 99999) during state transitions to keep tests reliable and repeatable.

references.rationale: Properly cites the ChromeStatus feature link under see also.

design_system.rationale: Applies the repository design beautifully, placing phone frames, clean list rows, and clear buttons.

openQuestions.title: Fix raw HTML tags rendering in behavior description box
openQuestions.detail: The descriptions object uses escaped HTML entities like '<strong>'. When assigned to innerHTML on line 290, the browser displays the literal string tags 'chain' to the user instead of styling the word as bold. Replace them with raw HTML tags '' to render formatted text.
